name: Protocell Division
description: Synthetic biology oil droplets in water that divide and merge like protocells. Rainbow-colored oil slicks on spherical membranes, organic blob shapes deforming under surface tension, and sudden division events where one cell splits into two. Bass triggers division events, mids control surface tension, treble adds membrane vibration ripples, and mouse attracts nearby blobs.

params.name: Cell Count
params.description: Number of protocells visible in the field

params.name: Surface Tension
params.description: Roundness vs amoeboid deformation of cell membranes

params.name: Iridescence
params.description: Intensity of thin-film interference rainbow colors

params.name: Division Rate
params.description: Speed of cell division and merging cycles
